description:
This quiz evaluates a developer's mastery of JavaScript's numeric conversion functions, focusing on the nuanced differences in how they handle whitespace, radix arguments, and invalid characters. It maintains a technical and comparative tone, presenting an intermediate-level challenge regarding core language behavior.
Topics: JavaScript, Type Conversion, parseInt, parseFloat, Number, BigInt, Data Types
Audience: Intermediate JavaScript developers and software engineering students.
